plugins.name: claudehut
plugins.description: Agentic AI workflow plugin for Java backend engineers — enforces 6-phase pipeline (Brainstorm → Spec → Plan → Build → Loop → Learn) with project-aware memory & retrieval reinforcement, hook-gated phase enforcement, and strict TDD discipline.
